calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Assets In Trust
Off Calendar Nov-15-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mara Erlach for (trustee) Kedar Karim Adour, MD.

The Court stated that there is an issue regarding the search for heirs and property acquired after the trust was created, that there is no general assignment, that there is no specific assignment regarding the property and the reliance on a clause regarding administration. Ms. Erlach stated that the trust contains an assignment clause and cited the Ukkestad case. The Court stated that there was not a general assignment in that case. Ms. Erlach stated that there is a pour-over-will which will give the same result. The Court stated that a pour-over-will is not an assignment to a trust. Ms. Erlach stated that there are 4 other Wells Fargo accounts in the trust aside from this one and that it was an oversight. The Court denied the Petition for Order confirming Assets in Trust.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
